codeql_results.message: XML parsing depends on a [user-provided value](1) without guarding against uncontrolled entity expansion.

findings.novelty_reason: Common XXE pattern in XML parsing
findings.description: The application parses user-supplied XML data without proper sanitization, potentially leading to XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.
findings.remediation_code: Use a secure XML parser that disables external entity resolution or sanitize user input before parsing.
findings.remediation_description: Implement measures to prevent the processing of external entities in XML data.

report.recommendation: Review and address the potential XXE vulnerability identified by CodeQL.
